allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; users=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(u.get\('username','?'\), u.get\('email',''\)\) for u in users]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('error','OK'\), d.get\('access_token',''\)[:80] if 'access_token' in d else d.get\('error_description',''\)\)")
Bash(AWS_PROFILE=admin aws s3api get-bucket-cors --bucket pede-aqui-dev-documents-493628259161 --region eu-west-1)

Bash(python3 -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\('admin/terraform.tfstate'\)\);[print\('region=',i['attributes'].get\('region'\),'| bucket=',i['attributes'].get\('bucket'\),'| id=',i['attributes'].get\('id'\)\) for r in d['resources'] if r['type']=='aws_s3_bucket' for i in r['instances']]")
